no_changes_rationale:
All spec changes required by ddx-cf37253d were implemented and merged in a prior
attempt (commit f489e9409: "spec: define explicit cleanup policy values in
FEAT-010, SD-025, P8 [ddx-cf37253d]"). The working tree is clean; no further
edits are needed.

AC verification:
1. FEAT-010 lines 642-645 list DDx-owned scratch prefixes and cleanup.json rule.
2. FEAT-010 lines 649-652 define the 6-hour mtime rule for metadata-less paths.
3. FEAT-010 lines 627-630 define soft trigger (512 MiB/8192 inodes) and hard
   floor (64 MiB/1024 inodes).
4. SD-025 lines 226-234 and 292-295 mirror the same values.
5. reliability-principles.md P8 lines 60-68 reference FEAT-010/SD-025.
6. Bead labels contain no needs_human entry.

verification_command: grep -q "ddx-test-" docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-010-task-execution.md && grep -q "512 MiB" docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-010-task-execution.md && grep -q "512 MiB" docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-025-task-execution-lifecycle.md && grep -q "FEAT-010" docs/helix/06-iterate/reliability-principles.md && echo "all checks passed"
